settings.title: Settings
settings.noAccessDescription: Your current role does not have permissions for this module.
settings.discardMessage: You have unsaved changes in this module. Switching now will discard those edits.
settings.resetModuleMessage: This will reset {module} to default values.
settings.revertAccountMessage: This will discard unsaved account edits and restore the last saved values.
settings.toast.noPermission: You do not have permission to update this settings module.
settings.toast.fixErrors: Please fix the account form errors before saving.
settings.module.accountDescription: View and manage your personal profile
settings.notifications.title: Notification Preferences
settings.notifications.description: Choose what your team should be notified about.
settings.security.title: Security Controls
settings.security.description: Apply baseline controls for your organization users.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.description: Tune visual preferences for your workspace.
settings.appearance.appliedImmediately: Applied immediately. Resets to dark on logout.
settings.appearance.lightModeUpcomingMes: Light mode is not yet available. We are working on it and it will be released in a future update.
settings.appearance.languageDescription: Choose the language used by the administration modules.
settings.account.readOnlyNotice: You do not have permission to edit your profile. Contact an administrator to request access.
settings.account.taxIdHelp: Optional, but if provided must be valid.
settings.organization.title: Organization Profile
settings.organization.description: Basic information and operational policies for your organization.
settings.organization.damageDueDaysHelp: Number of days after an inspection to set as the due date for damage invoices (1–365).
settings.organization.requireFullPayment: Require rental fee payment before checkout
When enabled, loans cannot be checked out until the rental fee has been recorded as paid.
settings.organization.readOnlyNotice: You have read-only access to this section. Contact an administrator to request edit permissions.
settings.module.organizationDescription: Configure organization policies and operational rules
settings.codeSchemes.title: Code Schemes
settings.codeSchemes.description: Define naming patterns used to auto-generate human-readable codes for loans, requests, invoices, inspections, incidents, maintenance batches, and material instances.
settings.codeSchemes.noSchemesDescriptio: Create a code scheme to auto-generate codes for this entity type.
settings.codeSchemes.deleteConfirmMessag: Are you sure you want to delete the scheme "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
settings.codeSchemes.toast.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
settings.codeSchemes.patternBuilderHint: Click tokens to build the pattern. Click a token in the pattern to remove it.
settings.codeSchemes.cannotDeleteDefault: The default scheme cannot be deleted.
settings.codeSchemes.scopeInfo: Scoping limits this scheme to a specific material type or category. Leave as Global to apply to all material instances.
settings.codeSchemes.autoGenNotice: This field is auto-generated by the active code scheme and cannot be edited manually.
settings.codeSchemes.autoGenSerialNotice: When a code scheme is active for material instances, the serial number is auto-generated. You may still enter one manually if preferred.
settings.codeSchemes.validation.nameTooL: Scheme name must not exceed 100 characters.
settings.codeSchemes.validation.patternN: Pattern must contain a {SEQ} or {SEQ:N} token.
settings.codeSchemes.validation.scopeTok: {TYPE_CODE} and {CATEGORY_CODE} are only valid for material instance schemes.
